title: Message Frame
text: Message Frame Displays the messages for the application or component. Messages are only sent to the message frame if you have specified that in the Settings for the Message Frame, I/O Print, and Tracing. Specifying Message Frame information To determine what information is sent to the Message Frame, choose View > Settings . Use the Message Frame , I/O Print , and Tracing tabs in the Settings dialog box. How to To determine what information is sent to the Message Frame, choose View > Settings .
